expectations.text: Checks which account is mapped to the project directory
expectations.evidence: No config-based mapping concept. Just checks railway whoami for the global session.

expectations.text: Verifies identity with railway whoami or similar
expectations.evidence: Step 1 runs railway whoami to check current account

expectations.text: Shows how to fix the mapping or switch to correct account
expectations.evidence: Fix is railway logout + railway login (browser-based). No token/mapping approach.
Deploys with plain 'railway up' — no RAILWAY_TOKEN prefix. Token only mentioned in CI/CD troubleshooting tip.
Step 5 includes railway status to verify correct project linkage
